mapper.select: SELECT v.*, u.real_name as makerName, c.real_name as checkerName, p.real_name as posterName, CASE v.audit_status WHEN 0 THEN '待审核' WHEN 1 THEN '已审核' WHEN 2 THEN '驳回' END as auditStatusName, CASE v.posting_status WHEN 0 THEN '未过账' WHEN 1 THEN '已过账' END as postingStatusName FROM voucher v LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON v.maker_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user c ON v.checker_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user p ON v.poster_id = p.id WHERE v.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voucher (voucher_no, voucher_date, attachment_count, maker_id, checker_id, poster_id, audit_status, posting_status, total_amount, remark, create_time) VALUES (#{voucherNo}, #{voucherDate}, #{attachmentCount}, #{makerId}, #{checkerId}, #{posterId}, #{auditStatus}, #{postingStatus}, #{totalAmount}, #{remark}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE voucher SET voucher_date = #{voucherDate}, attachment_count = #{attachmentCount}, checker_id = #{checkerId}, poster_id = #{posterId}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, posting_status = #{postingStatus}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voucher WHERE voucher_no LIKE 'V' || #{dateStr} || '%'

SELECT s.id as subjectId, s.subject_code as subjectCode, s.subject_name as subjectName, s.balance_direction as balanceDirection, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN vi.direction = '1' THEN vi.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as debitAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN vi.direction = '2' THEN vi.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as creditAmount, COUNT(DISTINCT v.id) as voucherCount FROM account_subject s LEFT JOIN voucher_item vi ON s.id = vi.subject_id LEFT JOIN voucher v ON vi.voucher_id = v.id AND v.voucher_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND v.posting_status = 1 WHERE s.status = 1 GROUP BY s.id, s.subject_code, s.subject_name, s.balance_direction ORDER BY s.subject_code
